subject: beta 1.0.7W crashes immediatly
body:
Hi,

I had trouble with K3 data. Thus I downloaded the beta 1.07W_beta2. However 
as soon as I start processing I am getting: 

System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of 
an object.

   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.SendCommand(NamedSerializableObject command)

   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Dispose()

   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.Finalize()

Further I noticed our QuadroP6000 cards are shown as having 6800 MB RAM but 
they are supposed to have 8000 MB. 

Any idea what is wrong. 


best

YHS
